metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Advanced students develop sophisticated directorial and scriptwriting skills through creation of substantial theatrical works. This course emphasizes artistic leadership, professional standards, and preparing for advanced study or professional practice.
metadata.general_description: Advanced directing and script development course for substantial theatrical creation.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced directors and writers create substantial works demonstrating artistic leadership and sophisticated vision.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 students create full-length or complex works that show mature artistic perspective and mastery of directorial and writing craft.

big_ideas.statement: Professional directing and writing demand technical excellence, clear communication, and artistic integrity.
big_ideas.elaboration: Advanced practitioners understand professional standards, manage complex productions, and maintain artistic vision through collaborative processes.

big_ideas.statement: Sophisticated theatre engages with meaningful ideas, diverse perspectives, and contemporary contexts.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 works explore complex themes, represent diverse voices, and contribute to artistic discourse about important issues and questions.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced directing and writing position students for professional theatre work or advanced study.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 students develop professional portfolios and skills necessary for continued development in theatre careers or higher education.

competencies.raw: Create and direct substantial theatrical works
i_can_statements: I can direct full-length or complex theatrical productions
I can realize ambitious directorial visions
I can manage all creative and technical elements of production
I can create work meeting professional theatrical standards

competencies.raw: Write original scripts of significant scope and complexity
i_can_statements: I can write full-length original plays or substantial dramatic works
I can create complex characters and rich dramatic structures
I can write in various dramatic forms and genres
I can develop scripts for production and public performance

competencies.raw: Develop sophisticated directorial vision and artistic concept
i_can_statements: I can develop complex artistic concepts guiding production
I can create cohesive vision across all production elements
I can make bold artistic choices with clear rationale
I can maintain artistic integrity through production process

competencies.raw: Lead artistic teams and manage complex productions
i_can_statements: I can lead directors, designers, and technical teams effectively
I can manage all aspects of theatrical production
I can coordinate intricate technical and creative elements
I can maintain vision while remaining responsive to collaborative input

competencies.raw: Analyze dramatic works with sophisticated critical frameworks
i_can_statements: I can conduct detailed textual and dramaturgical analysis
I can understand plays within literary, historical, and cultural contexts
I can identify and articulate themes and meanings
I can evaluate how dramatic choices create artistic effects

competencies.raw: Understand directorial and scripting craft at professional level
i_can_statements: I can understand and apply professional directing techniques
I can understand dramatic structure and craft deeply
I can recognize sophisticated writing and staging approaches
I can evaluate work against professional standards

competencies.raw: Reflect on artistic growth and evolving artistic voice
i_can_statements: I can articulate my artistic philosophy and approach
I can evaluate how my work has developed and matured
I can identify my unique voice as director and writer
I can envision continued artistic development

competencies.raw: Engage with theatre discourse and contemporary practice
i_can_statements: I can participate in conversations about contemporary theatre
I can understand current artistic movements and debates
I can position work within broader theatrical context
I can recognize diverse voices and perspectives in theatre

competencies.raw: Create professional scripts and production documentation
i_can_statements: I can write scripts meeting professional production standards
I can create comprehensive directorial prompt books
I can develop detailed production plans and specifications
I can maintain professional documentation and records

competencies.raw: Lead and communicate with artistic teams and collaborators
i_can_statements: I can articulate artistic vision clearly and compellingly
I can lead rehearsals and guide artistic development
I can collaborate effectively with designers and specialists
I can provide clear direction and constructive feedback

competencies.raw: Present work and engage audiences professionally
i_can_statements: I can present theatrical work in formal contexts
I can write program notes and artist statements
I can discuss work with audiences and critics
I can engage audiences in theatrical experience

competencies.raw: Communicate artistic vision through theatrical work
i_can_statements: I can use theatre to express complex ideas and perspectives
I can create work that resonates with diverse audiences
I can use theatre as platform for important conversations
I can develop distinctive artistic voice and vision

competencies.raw: Engage with diverse theatrical traditions and contemporary practice
i_can_statements: I can create work informed by diverse theatrical traditions
I can understand and appreciate global theatre practices
I can respectfully incorporate diverse traditions
I can develop contemporary approach rooted in tradition

competencies.raw: Explore theatre's social, cultural, and political dimensions
i_can_statements: I can create work addressing social or cultural issues
I can use theatre as vehicle for diverse perspectives
I can engage audiences in meaningful conversations
I can understand theatre's power as social commentary
I can create professional portfolio of directorial and writing work
I can establish professional networks in theatre
I can seek mentorship and professional guidance
I can build reputation and professional presence

competencies.raw: Plan trajectory toward professional theatre career
i_can_statements: I can identify professional goals and aspirations
I can develop plan for continued artistic development
I can explore pathways to professional theatre work
I can commit to lifelong artistic practice and growth

areas.name: Advanced Directing Practice
topics: Conceptual development and artistic vision for substantial works
Actor direction and character development at advanced level
Integration of design and production elements

areas.name: Advanced Scriptwriting and Dramatic Craft
topics: Writing full-length or complex original plays
Exploring diverse dramatic forms and genres

areas.name: Theatrical Leadership and Production Management
topics: Working with technical specialists and designers

areas.name: Professional Theatre Practice and Development
topics: Understanding theatre industry and career pathways
Grant writing and funding for theatre projects
Continued artistic development and growth planning
